title: 10 best herbal creams for one side headache

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Fennel creams helps with one side headache because of its potent analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The herb fennel has been used for centuries to soothe headaches, including those caused by tension and stress. When applied topically in a cream form, the active compounds in fennel, such as anethole and borneol, work directly on the affected area, reducing pain and inflammation. This targeted relief can help alleviate one-sided headaches, allowing sufferers to find quick and natural pain management.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Fennel cream's anti-inflammatory compound, anethole, helps reduce swelling and inflammation in blood vessels, which can contribute to one-sided headaches.
Antispasmodic property: The antispasmodic compounds present in fennel cream, such as borneol and borneol acetate, help relax tense muscles and alleviate spasms that can cause one-sided headaches.
Pain-relieving property: Fennel's essential oil contains a compound called fenchone, which has natural analgesic and anti-pain properties, helping to reduce pain associated with one-sided headaches.
remedy_parts: Roots: Fennel roots are used due to their ability to stimulate blood flow and reduce inflammation, making them effective in alleviating one-sided headache pain.
Seeds: Fennel seeds contain a compound called anethole, which has anti-inflammatory properties that help to soothe and calm the affected area.
remedy_recipe: Gather fresh foeniculum vulgare leaves and stems in an amount of 100-150 grams for the cream recipe.
Dry the foeniculum vulgare mixture in a warm and dark place for at least 7 days or up to 14 days.
Grind 50 grams of dried foeniculum vulgare into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground foeniculum vulgare powder with 20 milliliters of sweet almond oil and 10 milliliters of beeswax in a heat-resistant glass bowl.
Heat the mixture over low heat for approximately 30 minutes or until the wax is completely melted and the cream has a smooth consistency.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Peppermint creams helps with one side headache because of its cooling and analgesic properties. The menthol present in peppermint relaxes the muscles in the neck and scalp, reducing tension that can cause headaches. Additionally, the cream's topical application allows for direct absorption into the skin, providing rapid relief from pain. As the cream is applied to the affected side, it helps to ease muscle spasms and reduces inflammation, providing effective relief from one-sided headache symptoms.
remedy_properties: Cools and soothes: Peppermint's natural cooling effect helps to reduce inflammation and ease tension in the affected area, providing rapid relief from headache discomfort.
Eases pain: Menthol, a key active compound in peppermint, has analgesic properties that help numb the pain associated with one-sided headaches, making them feel more manageable.
Relaxes muscles: The relaxing and calming effects of peppermint can help to ease muscle tension, which is often a contributing factor to one-sided headaches, promoting a sense of relief and comfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: Peppermint roots are used due to their high concentration of menthol, which can help alleviate tension and relieve pain in the affected area.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzome, or underground stem, of peppermint is rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that can help soothe and calm the scalp and surrounding tissues.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh peppermint leaves and rinse them gently under cold running water for 30 seconds.
Combine 20g of dried peppermint leaves with 100ml of boiling water in a heat-resistant glass cup for 10 minutes.
Strain the peppermint infusion through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass bowl and discard solids for 5 minutes.
Mix 50g of beeswax pellets with 20g of coconut oil in a small saucepan over low heat stirring constantly for 10 minutes.
Combine the peppermint infusion and beeswax-coconut oil mixture in a blender or food processor blending until smooth and creamy.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sage creams helps with one side headache because of its unique ability to relax and calm the mind and body. The antispasmodic properties in sage work to ease muscle tension, which is a common cause of one-sided headaches. Additionally, sage's natural anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce swelling and pain in the affected area, providing quick relief from discomfort. By applying sage creams directly to the forehead or temples, individuals can experience fast and effective alleviation of one-sided headaches.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Herbal sage creams contain compounds like rosmarinic acid and camphor, which have potent anti-inflammatory effects, helping to reduce swelling and pain in the affected area.
Pain-relieving properties: Sage contains salvinorin A, a natural analgesic that can help alleviate headache pain by blocking pain receptors and reducing inflammation in the nerves.

Antispasmodic properties: The essential oils present in sage creams, such as camphor and borneol, have antispasmodic effects, which can help relax tense muscles and blood vessels, alleviating migraines and one-sided headaches.
remedy_parts: Roots: Sage roots are rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help alleviate pain and reduce swelling caused by one-sided headaches.
Barks: The barks of the sage plant contain tannins, which have astringent properties that can help constrict blood vessels and reduce inflammation, providing relief from one-side headaches.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20 grams of dried salvia officinalis leaves from a trusted supplier or grow your own garden.
Combine the dried salvia officinalis leaves with 100 milliliters of coconut oil and 50 milliliters of beeswax in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture over low heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the beeswax is fully melted and the mixture reaches a temperature of 160°f.
Allow the mixture to cool and thicken for at least 2 hours before transferring it to an airtight container for storage.
Apply 1-2 teaspoons of the salvia officinalis cream to the affected side of your head as needed, up to three times daily for relief.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: English lavender creams helps with one side headache because of its calming and soothing properties. The fragrance of lavender has a natural analgesic effect, helping to ease tension and relieve pain in the affected area. As the cream is applied topically, it can directly target the specific site of discomfort, reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. By using herbal English lavender creams, individuals may find relief from one-sided headaches without resorting to medication.
remedy_properties: Sedative and Calming Properties: Lavender's calming effects can help reduce stress and anxiety, which are common triggers for one-sided headaches. By promoting relaxation, it can ease tension in the neck and scalp muscles, reducing pain and discomfort.

Anti-Inflammatory and Analgesic Properties: Lavender contains compounds like linalool and linalyl acetate that have anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which can help reduce swelling and pain associated with one-sided headaches. These compounds may also help alleviate muscle spasms and tension.

Antioxidant and Antimicrobial Properties: Lavender's antioxidant properties can help protect the skin from oxidative stress and damage caused by free radicals, while its antimicrobial properties can help prevent infections that may contribute to headache development. This can be especially beneficial for people who experience frequent or recurring one-sided headaches.
remedy_parts: Roots: Lavender roots are used to create calming and soothing creams due to their ability to reduce inflammation and relax tense muscles.
Seeds: Lavender seeds contain a high concentration of essential oils, which help to ease tension and reduce pain in the affected area.
remedy_recipe: Weigh and dry 50g of fresh lavender flowers in a single layer on paper towels for 2 hours.
Combine 20ml of distilled water with 10ml of carrier oil such as coconut or sweet almond oil in a heatproof glass measuring cup.
Add 5g of dried lavender flowers to the mixture and let it steep for 30 minutes to allow the essential oils to infuse.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass jar discarding the solids and storing the liquid at room temperature.
Allow the infused oil to cool before whipping with an electric mixer until it thickens to form a smooth cream taking approximately 10 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Rosemary creams helps with one side headache because of its natural anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. The cream's active ingredients, such as rosmarinic acid and camphor, work to reduce swelling and relieve pain in the affected area. When applied topically to the forehead or neck, rosemary creams can help alleviate tension headaches, migraines, and sinus headaches that often manifest on one side of the head. Additionally, the cream's warming sensation can help increase blood flow and relaxation, further easing headache symptoms.
remedy_properties: Antispasmodic property: Rosemary's antispasmodic compounds help to relax and ease muscle contractions, which can contribute to one-sided headaches by reducing tension in the neck and scalp.
Anti-inflammatory property: Rosemary's anti-inflammatory properties can help reduce inflammation and swelling in the blood vessels, which may be contributing to the headache.
Analgesic property: Rosemary's analgesic compounds can help to numb or dull the pain associated with one-sided headaches, providing relief from discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rosemary roots have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in reducing swelling and pain associated with one-sided headaches.
Leaves: Fresh or dried rosemary leaves contain camphor, which has natural analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, helping to alleviate headache symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh or dried leaves of rosmarinus officinalis and chop them into small pieces.
Combine 20 grams of chopped herb with 100 milliliters of carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil.
Infuse the mixture in a cool dark place for 14 days to allow the herbal properties to transfer.
Strain the infusion through cheesecloth and discard the solids before adding 10 grams of beeswax.
Heat the mixture gently until the beeswax is fully incorporated and the cream has thickened within 30 minutes.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemon balm creams helps with one side headache because of its ability to relax tense muscles and calm the mind. The cream's antispasmodic properties help to ease tension in the neck and scalp, which is a common trigger for unilateral headaches. Additionally, lemon balm's natural sedative effects can help to reduce stress and anxiety, both of which are known contributors to headache development. By applying the cream topically, individuals can experience fast relief from one-sided headaches.
remedy_properties: Antispasmodic property: Lemon balm cream helps to relax muscle spasms and reduce tension, which can contribute to one-sided headaches such as migraines or temporomandibular joint (TMJ) disorders.
Anxiolytic property: Lemon balm has been shown to have a calming effect on the nervous system, reducing anxiety and stress that can exacerbate one-sided headaches such as tension headaches.

Anti-inflammatory property: Lemon balm cream may help reduce inflammation in the affected area, which can contribute to pain and discomfort associated with one-sided headaches such as sinus headaches or facial pain.
remedy_parts: Roots: Lemon balm roots have been traditionally used to treat tension and stress-related headaches, including those affecting only one side of the head.
Leaves: The leaves of the lemon balm plant contain rosmarinic acid, a compound with anti-inflammatory properties that can help alleviate pain and discomfort associated with one-sided headaches.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh melissa officinalis leaves from your garden or store dried ones from a reputable supplier measuring 20g.
Combine the harvested leaves with 100ml of boiling water in a heat-resistant glass bowl steeping for 10-15 minutes.
Strain the liquid through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass container discarding the solids and preserving the infused liquid.
Mix the infused liquid with 50g of beeswax pellets, 20ml of coconut oil, and 20ml of sweet almond oil in a double boiler melting the mixture for 10-15 minutes.
Pour the melted mixture into sterilized glass jars and let it cool at room temperature taking about 30 minutes before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold creams helps with one side headache because of its potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The cream's active ingredients, including flavonoids and terpenoids, work to reduce swelling and ease pain in the affected area, providing fast and effective relief from tension headaches that often manifest on one side of the head. By applying a thin layer of pot marigold cream directly to the sore spot, individuals can experience rapid alleviation of discomfort and resume their daily activities with renewed energy and focus.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Pot marigold cream's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as flavonoids and terpenes, help reduce swelling and pain in the affected area, thereby alleviating headache symptoms.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in pot marigold cream neutralize free radicals that can contribute to oxidative stress and inflammation, which may be contributing factors to one-sided headaches.
Analgesic and anti-pain properties: Pot marigold's analgesic compounds, such as flavonoids and alkaloids, help reduce pain perception and alleviate discomfort associated with one-sided headaches.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective in reducing pain and swelling associated with one-sided headaches.
Buds: The buds contain flavonoids and saponins that help to reduce inflammation and relieve tension in the blood vessels, which can contribute to one-sided headaches.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry 100g of fresh calendula flowers in shade for 2 weeks.
Blend 50g of dried calendula petals with 250ml of coconut oil and 20ml of beeswax in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture at low temperature for 30 minutes stirring occasionally until melted and well combined.
Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature then stir in 5 drops of peppermint essential oil.
Pour the mixture into sterilized glass jars filling to the brim and seal immediately.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: St John's Wort creams helps with one side headache because of its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The cream absorbs quickly into the skin, providing rapid relief from pain and discomfort. Its ability to relax blood vessels and reduce inflammation helps to alleviate tension and pressure in the affected area. Additionally, St John's Wort has a gentle, soothing effect on the skin, which can help to calm the nervous system and promote overall relaxation. remedy_properties: Hyperforin: Helps to reduce inflammation and pain by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory molecules, which can contribute to headache symptoms.

Hypericin: Has anti-platelet and blood thinning properties, which can help to prevent blood clots and improve blood flow to the brain, potentially alleviating one-sided headaches caused by reduced blood flow.
Flavonoids: Possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, potentially contributing to headache relief.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of St John's Wort contain a high concentration of hyperforin, a compound with anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties that can help alleviate headache pain.

Barks: The barks of St John's Wort contain flavonoids and tannins that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help reduce inflammation and discomfort associated with one-sided headaches.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50 grams of fresh st. john's wort leaves and flowers, rinse them gently with distilled water.
Mix the harvested herbs with 100 milliliters of witch hazel in a clean glass jar, steep for 30 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into another clean glass container, discard solids.
Add 200 grams of unrefined coconut oil to the herbal extract, heat gently over low flame until melted.
Pour the warm herbal oil mixture into sterilized jars, seal tightly and store in a cool dark place.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Tasmanian blue gum creams helps with one side headache because they contain a unique combination of herbal extracts that target the underlying causes of tension and stress. The calming properties of eucalyptus, peppermint, and lavender soothe the mind and body, reducing muscle contractions and promoting relaxation. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory compounds in the cream help to reduce swelling and ease pain in the affected area, providing fast and effective relief from one-sided headaches.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Tasmanian Blue Gum contains compounds like eucalyptol and alpha-pinene that have anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce swelling and pain in the affected area, providing relief from one-sided headaches.

Pain-relieving properties: The cream's active ingredients, such as cineole and bornyl acetate, have analgesic properties, which can help numb the pain associated with a one-sided headache, allowing for quicker recovery.
Antispasmodic properties: Tasmanian Blue Gum's ability to relax muscles and reduce spasms can help alleviate tension headaches, including those that cause unilateral pain (one-sided).
remedy_parts: Roots: Tasmanian blue gum roots have been traditionally used to relieve tension and stress, which can contribute to one-side headaches.

remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried eucalyptus globulus leaves in quantities of 10 grams per batch.
Combine the dried eucalyptus globulus leaves with 20 grams of cold-pressed coconut oil and 5 grams of beeswax.
Heat the mixture at a gentle simmer for 30 minutes to extract the essential oils and compounds from the eucalyptus globulus.
Strain the cooled mixture through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into a clean glass container discarding any solids.
Whip the clear liquid with an electric mixer until it thickens to a creamy consistency suitable for topical application.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Wintergreen creams helps with one side headache because of its unique ability to target and relieve tension in the temples and forehead, which are common areas affected by one-sided headaches. The cream's active ingredient, methyl salicylate, penetrates deep into the skin to provide fast-acting pain relief and reduce inflammation. As a natural relaxant, wintergreen also helps to ease muscle tension, allowing for a soothing and calming effect that can help to alleviate headache symptoms and promote recovery.
remedy_properties: Methyl Salicylate: Relieves pain and reduces inflammation by blocking the production of prostaglandins, which are hormone-like substances that cause pain and fever. This property makes it effective in easing headache symptoms.
Gaultheria: Contains analgesic and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to numb the affected area, reducing pain and discomfort associated with one-side headaches.

Vasodilating Properties: Wintergreen's active compound, methyl salicylate, also has a vasodilating effect, which helps to dilate blood vessels and improve blood flow to the affected area, further relieving headache symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in methyl salicylate, a natural analgesic and anti-inflammatory compound that helps relieve headache pain.
Bark: Contains wintergreen oil, which has been traditionally used to soothe and calm headache symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry gaultheria procumbens leaves in shade for two weeks to ensure crispness and potency.
Combine dried gaultheria procumbens leaves with 20% jojoba oil and 5% beeswax in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture at 160°f for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, to infuse the oil with herbal properties.
Strain the cooled mixture through cheesecloth into a clean glass jar, discarding solids and preserving liquid.
Allow the infused oil to cool and thicken at room temperature for six hours before application.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Elder creams helps with one side headache because it contains natural anti-inflammatory compounds that target the source of pain. The cream's active ingredients, such as glycosides and flavonoids, work to reduce swelling and ease tension in the affected area, providing relief from pressure and discomfort. This localized approach allows the cream to target the specific spot causing the headache, bringing fast and effective relief without overwhelming the entire body with medication.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Elder cream contains anti-inflammatory compounds like flavonoids and anthocyanins, which help reduce swelling and pain in the affected area, providing relief from headache symptoms.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidant-rich ingredients in elder cream help neutralize free radicals that can cause oxidative stress and inflammation in the body, contributing to headache development and severity.

Vasodilatory effects: Elder cream's vasodilatory compounds, such as flavonoids, help relax blood vessels and improve circulation, which can alleviate tension headaches by reducing blood vessel constriction and promoting healthy blood flow.
remedy_parts: Roots: Elder roots have anti-inflammatory properties that help to reduce swelling and ease tension in the affected side of the head, providing relief from headache pain.
Rhyzomes: The rhizomes of the elder plant contain compounds that act as natural pain relievers, helping to alleviate one-sided headache symptoms by reducing inflammation and discomfort.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh sambucus nigra flowers and leaves for the desired quantity of 20 grams.
Dry the plant material in a well-ventilated area at room temperature for 7 days.
Grind the dried sambucus nigra into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix the powdered sambucus nigra with 100 grams of coconut oil and 20 grams of beeswax in a heat-resistant bowl.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler at medium heat for 30 minutes stirring occasionally to create a smooth cream.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion creams helps with one side headache because they contain a unique combination of bioactive compounds that target the root cause of unilateral headaches. The anti-inflammatory properties of dandelion soothe and calm inflamed blood vessels, while its analgesic properties relieve pain and discomfort. Additionally, dandelion's ability to reduce stress and anxiety levels helps to mitigate trigger factors that can contribute to one-sided head pain. As a result, dandelion creams provide natural and effective relief for people suffering from one side headaches.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Dandelion contains anti-inflammatory compounds like taraxasterol, which can help reduce inflammation and swelling in the blood vessels, potentially alleviating headache pain.

Antioxidant activity: The antioxidants present in dandelion cream, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, may help protect the body from free radical damage, which can contribute to oxidative stress and headache development.

Vasodilatory effects: Dandelion's bioactive compounds, including sesquiterpenes, can cause blood vessels to dilate, which may help increase blood flow to the affected area, potentially reducing tension and alleviating headache pain.
remedy_parts: Roots: Known for their anti-inflammatory properties, dandelion roots help reduce pain and swelling associated with one-sided headaches.
Leaves: Rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, dandelion leaves soothe and calm irritated nerve endings, alleviating one-sided headache symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Gather 2 tablespoons of dried taraxacum officinale leaves and flowers.
Combine the ingredients in a saucepan with 1 cup of olive oil and heat over medium flame.
Steep for 30 minutes, then strain the mixture through a cheesecloth into a clean glass jar.
Add 1 tablespoon of beeswax and 10 drops of lavender essential oil to the infused oil and stir until melted.
Pour the cooled cream into small tin containers and store in the refrigerator for up to 2 weeks.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Yarrow creams helps with one side headache because of its natural analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The cream's active ingredients, such as chamazulene and sesquiterpene lactones, work to reduce pain and inflammation in the affected area. Additionally, yarrow's ability to improve blood circulation may help to relieve tension and pressure that can cause headaches. By applying the cream topically to the affected side of the head, individuals may experience a rapid reduction in headache severity and frequency.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compounds: Yarrow's flavonoids and phenolic acids have anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce swelling and pain in the blood vessels, potentially alleviating one-sided headache symptoms.

Vasoconstricting properties: Yarrow's active compounds, such as chamazulene, have a vasoconstrictive effect, which means they can help narrow blood vessels and reduce blood flow to the affected area, thereby reducing migraine-like pain.

Antispasmodic effects: Yarrow's essential oils, including estragole and anethole, have antispasmodic properties, which can help relax muscles and relieve tension in the neck and head, potentially alleviating one-sided headache symptoms.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in sesquiterpenes and other bioactive compounds, which help reduce inflammation and relieve pain associated with one-sided headaches.
Flowers: Contain flavonoids and volatile oils that have anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making them effective in soothing headache symptoms.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh achillea millefolium leaves in the morning after dew has dried.
Dry the harvested leaves in a warm dark place for 7-10 days to reduce moisture content.
Combine 20g of dried achillea millefolium leaves with 100ml of cold-pressed extra virgin olive oil in a clean glass jar.
Store the mixture in a cool dry place for 2 weeks, shaking the jar daily to allow infusion to occur.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass container and discard solids after 1 hour.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle creams helps with one side headache because of its unique ability to relax and reduce inflammation in the affected areas. The cream's anti-inflammatory properties help to constrict blood vessels, which can contribute to the throbbing pain associated with migraines and tension headaches. Additionally, the cream's soothing and calming effects can help to ease muscle tension and pressure points on the affected side of the head, providing fast and effective relief from one-sided headaches.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Stinging nettle creams contain compounds like oleic acid and linoleic acid that have potent anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce swelling and pain in the affected area.

Pain-relieving properties: Nettle creams also contain bioactive compounds like flavonoids and triterpenoids, which have been shown to exhibit analgesic and antinociceptive (pain-relieving) activities, helping to alleviate headache pain.

Vasodilatory effects: The beta-carotene and other antioxidants present in nettle creams can help dilate blood vessels, which may improve blood flow and reduce constriction of the temporal artery, a common cause of one-side headaches.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots contain anti-inflammatory compounds that help reduce swelling and pain in the affected area, providing relief from a one-side headache.
Barks: The barks of the stinging nettle plant have been traditionally used to treat various types of headaches, including one-sided headaches, due to their analgesic and anti-spasmodic properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of fresh nettle leaves from organic sources or dried ones rehydrated in water.
Steep the harvested nettles in 200ml of boiling water for 30 minutes to create a strong infusion.
Strain the infusion through cheesecloth and discard the solids before adding 50g of beeswax and 20ml of coconut oil.
Heat the mixture over low heat stirring occasionally until the beeswax and coconut oil melt and combine with the infusion.
Remove from heat and allow to cool before pouring into a sterilized container for storage and later use as a topical cream.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemongrass creams helps with one side headache because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties. The active ingredients in lemongrass, such as citral and geraniol, work to reduce swelling and ease tension in the affected area. This targeted relief helps to alleviate pressure on the trigeminal nerve, which is often responsible for one-sided headaches. remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Lemongrass contains compounds like citral and geraniol that have anti-inflammatory effects, which can help reduce swelling and pain in the blood vessels on the affected side of the head.

Antispasmodic properties: The essential oils present in lemongrass, such as citronellal and limonene, can help relax muscle spasms and relieve tension in the neck and scalp, which may be contributing to the one-sided headache.

Analgesic properties: Lemongrass contains a compound called myrcene, which has analgesic and pain-relieving effects, helping to alleviate the throbbing or pulsating sensation associated with one-sided headaches.

Rhyzomes: Containing analgesic and antispasmodic properties, rhyzomes alleviate tension and relieve muscle contractions that cause one-sided headaches.
remedy_recipe: Weigh 20 grams of dried cymbopogon citratus leaves and grind into fine powder using mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered cymbopogon citratus leaves with 100 milliliters of coconut oil in a double boiler at low heat for 30 minutes.
Add 10 grams of beeswax pellets to the mixture and stir until fully incorporated, then remove from heat.
Pour the cooled mixture into glass jars and store in refrigerator for at least 2 hours before use, allowing it to solidify completely.
Apply a thin layer of the cymbopogon citratus cream directly to the affected side of the forehead as needed throughout the day to alleviate headache symptoms.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Basil creams helps with one side headache because of its unique ability to target the specific areas of the brain responsible for pain processing. The cream's active ingredients, including eugenol and linalool, are absorbed through the skin and work together to reduce inflammation and constrict blood vessels, which can help alleviate tension headaches that often occur on one side of the head. By directly addressing the root cause of the headache, basil creams provide targeted relief for a rapid and effective recovery.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Basil's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as eugenol and linalool, help to reduce swelling and pain in blood vessels, which may contribute to one-sided headaches.

Antispasmodic properties: The antispasmodic compounds in basil, like estragole and citronellal, can help to relax muscles and vasodilate blood vessels, alleviating tension and reducing the frequency of one-sided headaches.

Barks: Containing tannins and flavonoids, barks have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects that can help alleviate pain and reduce swelling caused by one-sided headaches.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50g of fresh ocimum basilicum leaves and dry them using shade drying method for 7 days.
Grind the dried basil leaves into fine powder using mortar and pestle and store it in air-tight container.
Mix 20g of powdered basil with 100g of cold-pressed coconut oil and 50g of beeswax pellets in double boiler.
Heat the mixture at 60°c for 10 minutes while stirring occasionally until the beeswax is fully dissolved.
Fill sterile glass jars with the prepared cream and label them, allowing it to cool and solidify before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marijuana creams helps with one side headache because they target the affected area directly, providing fast and effective relief from pain and discomfort. The active ingredients in these creams, such as cannabidiol (CBD) and tetrahydrocannabinol (THC), bind to receptors in the skin and brain, reducing inflammation and constricting blood vessels that may be contributing to the headache. As a result, herbal marijuana creams can quickly alleviate pressure and tension on the affected side of the head, providing instant relief from one-sided headaches.
remedy_properties: Cannabidiol (CBD): Helps to reduce inflammation, which is often a contributing factor to migraines and tension headaches, by interacting with the body's endocannabinoid system.
Terpenes: Provide a calming and relaxing effect on the mind and body, helping to reduce stress and anxiety, which can exacerbate headache symptoms.

Cannabis-activated compounds (e.g., THC): Help to relax muscles, reduce pain, and improve sleep quality, all of which are beneficial for alleviating headache symptoms such as tension, pressure, and discomfort.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are rich in cannabigerol, a natural anti-inflammatory agent that can help alleviate pain and reduce swelling associated with a one-sided headache.
Barks: The barks contain a high concentration of salicylic acid, similar to aspirin, which can help relieve the throbbing pain and discomfort caused by a one-sided headache.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh cannabis flowers with a minimum of 15% thc content and dry them thoroughly for at least three days.
Grind 20 grams of dried cannabis into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Combine the ground cannabis with 100 milliliters of olive oil in a double boiler over low heat for four hours, stirring occasionally.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into a clean container, pressing on solids to extract as much oil as possible.
Add 10 grams of beeswax and 10 drops of lavender essential oil to the extracted oil mixture and stir until fully incorporated.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chaste tree creams helps with one side headache because of its ability to balance hormones in the body, particularly progesterone. When progesterone levels become imbalanced, it can lead to migraines and other types of headaches that affect only one side of the head. The chaste tree herb has a natural ability to regulate hormonal fluctuations, which can help alleviate the symptoms of one-sided headaches. Regular use of these creams may provide relief from frequent or recurring episodes of one-side headaches.
remedy_properties: Spasmolytic activity: Chasteberry cream's spasmolytic activity helps to relax and reduce muscle contractions in the head and neck, which can contribute to one-sided headaches.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds present in chasteberry creams may help reduce swelling and inflammation in the blood vessels and nerves of the affected side, alleviating headache symptoms.

Vasodilatory effects: Chasteberry cream's vasodilatory properties can help widen blood vessels and improve blood flow to the affected area, which may help relieve one-sided headaches caused by vasoconstriction or poor circulation.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the chaste tree contain sesquiterpenes and iridoid glycosides, which help to relax muscles and reduce inflammation, making them effective in alleviating one-sided headaches.

Flowers: The flowers of the chaste tree are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, helping to soothe and calm the affected area and relieve headache pain.
remedy_recipe: Grind dried vitex agnus-castus flowers into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for about 10 minutes.
Melt 100g of coconut oil in a double boiler at low heat over medium-low heat for approximately 30-40 minutes.
Add the ground vitex agnus-castus powder to the melted coconut oil mixture and stir well with a spoon until fully incorporated.
Allow the mixture to cool and thicken at room temperature for about 1-2 hours or overnight in the refrigerator.
Transfer the cream into an airtight container and store it in the refrigerator for up to 6 months or use immediately.

intro_desc: Herbal creams for one side headache are topical treatments that use natural ingredients to alleviate pain and discomfort caused by unilateral headaches. These creams work by reducing inflammation, relaxing tense muscles, and promoting blood flow to the affected area. Examples of herbal creams that help with one side headache include peppermint oil, wintergreen oil, and arnica cream. By using these creams, individuals can experience significant relief from their symptoms, allowing them to improve their daily lives and engage in activities without distraction or discomfort.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat one side headache with herbal creams is to apply topical creams containing natural pain-relievers like arnica, peppermint, or wintergreen. These herbs reduce inflammation and ease pain. Mix equal parts of arnica oil and coconut oil and apply it directly to the affected area. Repeat as needed for relief. Additionally, use a cold compress to constrict blood vessels and further alleviate discomfort.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to one-side headache that are treated with herbal creams are migraines, neuralgia, and trigeminal nerve pain. Herbal creams containing ingredients like capsaicin, peppermint oil, and wintergreen oil can help alleviate these conditions by reducing inflammation, soothing the nerves, and relieving pain. These topical treatments can provide quick and effective relief without the need for prescription medication or invasive procedures.
